raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The open-ended request invites assessment of the thesis, gap framing, and contribution claim in the draft.","R1.2":"A general opinion on the excerpt centrally includes whether the argument chain from ambiguity problem to proposed system and results is coherent.","R1.3":"The draft makes empirical claims, so evaluating whether the reported results support the stated conclusions is central.","R1.4":"The excerpt positions ClarifySQL relative to prior datasets and systems, making novelty assessment a central expected responsibility.","R1.5":"The user is asking for overall judgment on a draft passage, which includes section-level narrative ordering and arc.","R1.6":"A broad reaction to prose naturally includes sentence-level clarity, register, flow, and concision.","R1.7":"Because the artifact relies on named benchmarks and citations, scholarship coverage and attribution are central to judging it.","RX.1":"Any projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of feedback the user intended from the short delegation.","RX.2":"The projected responsibilities should avoid inflating the request into tasks beyond a general paper-draft assessment.","RX.3":"The agent must not execute the delegation or critique the artifact, only map the responsibility space.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling unsupported or harmful downstream claims about the research artifact.","RX.5":"The mapping should remain traceable to specific features of the delegation and artifact."}}

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request invites assessment of the thesis, gap framing, and contribution claim in the draft.
rationale.R1.2: A general opinion on the excerpt centrally includes whether the argument chain from ambiguity problem to proposed system and results is coherent.
rationale.R1.3: The draft makes empirical claims, so evaluating whether the reported results support the stated conclusions is central.
rationale.R1.4: The excerpt positions ClarifySQL relative to prior datasets and systems, making novelty assessment a central expected responsibility.
rationale.R1.5: The user is asking for overall judgment on a draft passage, which includes section-level narrative ordering and arc.
rationale.R1.6: A broad reaction to prose naturally includes sentence-level clarity, register, flow, and concision.
rationale.R1.7: Because the artifact relies on named benchmarks and citations, scholarship coverage and attribution are central to judging it.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection must preserve uncertainty about what kind of feedback the user intended from the short delegation.
rationale.RX.2: The projected responsibilities should avoid inflating the request into tasks beyond a general paper-draft assessment.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must not execute the delegation or critique the artifact, only map the responsibility space.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling unsupported or harmful downstream claims about the research artifact.
rationale.RX.5: The mapping should remain traceable to specific features of the delegation and artifact.
